metadata.name: Narada
metadata.primary_role: Divine sage / Celestial messenger and traveler / Storyteller who narrates the story of Rama to Valmiki
metadata.ethnicity_cultural_context: Celestial (Deva-rishi, travels freely between all three worlds — heaven, earth, underworld)
metadata.divine_origin: Mind-born son of Brahma, eternal celibate, supreme devotee of Vishnu, cosmic journalist who carries news between worlds

timelines.context_description: Narada is the cosmic sage who narrates the story of Rama to Valmiki (inspiring the Ramayana) and appears at critical moments throughout both epics as a divine messenger and sometimes mischief-maker.

physical_appearance.skin_tone: Radiant golden-fair celestial complexion that literally glows with divine light, ageless and unworldly, skin shimmering with celestial energy
physical_appearance.height: Tall and lean, moves with extraordinary lightness — seems to float rather than walk, effortless grace of a being who flies between worlds
physical_appearance.build: Lean ethereal build, no physical bulk — his power is entirely spiritual and divine, long graceful limbs, appears almost weightless
physical_appearance.facial_features: Ageless beautiful face of a celestial being — large bright twinkling eyes full of mischief and cosmic knowledge, prominent high forehead, a knowing smile that suggests he always knows more than he reveals, sharp handsome features, expression shifts between cosmic seriousness and playful mischief, clean-shaven and eternally youthful
physical_appearance.hair: Top-knot of short black hair, neat and distinctive — the classic Narada style, occasionally with a small peacock feather or lotus tucked in
physical_appearance.distinguishing_marks: Always carries his Veena (stringed instrument) and perpetually chants 'Narayana Narayana!' — these two things are his absolute identifying marks, he appears and disappears at will, often stirring up necessary cosmic trouble

wardrobe_and_adornments.clothing: Simple celestial white dhoti and uttariya, luminous and pristine as if woven from moonlight, occasionally a saffron upper cloth, always impeccable and unwrinkled despite his constant travels
wardrobe_and_adornments.jewelry: Minimal but refined — a small Vishnu tilak on his forehead, Tulsi mala around his neck, small earrings, no heavy jewelry — a celestial sage's simplicity
wardrobe_and_adornments.weapons_carried: His mahati Veena (named instrument — his most famous possession), his words and knowledge (he has information about everything happening in all three worlds), his ability to appear anywhere instantly

audio_and_voice_characteristics.tone: Melodious, enthusiastic, mischievous, musical, always on the verge of revealing cosmic secrets or stirring up necessary trouble — the universe's premier gossip with divine purpose
audio_and_voice_characteristics.pitch: Light melodious tenor — musical and lilting, his speaking voice naturally flows into song, bright and carrying, the cheerful clear voice of an eternal optimist
audio_and_voice_characteristics.speech_style: Speaks with musical lilting cadence, naturally breaks into song and verse, peppers speech with 'Narayana Narayana!', knows everyone's secrets, delivers cosmic news with a storyteller's dramatic flair, his mischief always serves divine purpose
audio_and_voice_characteristics.emotional_baseline: Eternal cheerful devotion, cosmic mischief for divine purposes, the joy of one who knows all stories and loves telling them, playful wisdom

cinematic_generation_prompts.visual_prompt: Ethereal cinematic shot of Narada Muni, ageless celestial sage. Radiant golden-fair glowing complexion, ageless beautiful face with bright twinkling eyes and knowing smile. Lean graceful build in luminous white celestial robes. Playing his mahati Veena while floating on clouds between heaven and earth. Small peacock feather in his topknot. Cosmic background with stars, celestial palaces, and divine light. 3D Pixar style, ethereal luminous lighting, photorealistic, 8k.
cinematic_generation_prompts.audio_prompt: A light, melodious male tenor voice that naturally flows into song. Musical and lilting, perpetually chanting 'Narayana Narayana!' Cheerful, mischievous, ageless.
